chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 805 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3595/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Compliance of order dated 13-10-2025 has been submitted on behalf of Respondent No.1 / Special Secretary (Law) School Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, which reflects that inquiry was initiated and it was found that the appointment and offer orders of the Petitioner were genuine, therefore, he was allowed to join his services. However, due to some mistake his salary has not been released. Ali Akbar Kalhoro, Director School Education (Primary), Sukkur present in Court undertakes that within fifteen days’ time after curing the mistakes, salary of the petitioner will be credited in his Account. Counsel for the Petitioner on such statement and undertaking given by the officer present in Court seeks disposal of instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of; however, the respondents are directed to comply with the undertaking. In case of failure the contempt proceedings should be initiated against the delinquent officers. Judge Judge ARBROHI
